microsoft_ft: Served as **technical bridge** between enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) and internal engineering teams, translating complex recovery requirements into scoped execution plans driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service workflows that reduced operational toil by **30%** and scaled a 2-person process to support 45+ annual validation drills.
Owned the full technical workflow for 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation program, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by scoping builds, mapping dependencies, and surfacing critical hardware defects before customer impact.

Built an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, cutting cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to quote and deliver more engagements.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by leading customer demos and hands-on training sessions that expanded utilization across 14 engineering teams, saving 37 hours of manual effort monthly.

Conducted 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, translating customer requirements into a **roadmap recommendation** for intent-based YAML generation adopted by the product team.

Improved retrieval accuracy and data integrity by migrating documentation to a semantic search platform, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and establishing metadata standards later adopted across the broader tooling suite.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional buy-in across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in pulled-forward revenue.

Led technical discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then scoped and **proposed a roadmap** to automate critical paths — directly informing engineering prioritization.

Built a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership **clear visibility** into automation gaps and enabling data-driven decisions on where to invest engineering capacity first.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot fleet, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — delivering a handoff-ready technical scope on schedule.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil across the robotics platform.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to unblock cross-team delivery commitments.
pro_painters: Managed end-to-end scoping and quoting lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals**, optimizing the CRM workflow to increase job bookings by 26% and accelerate quote-to-close turnaround for field sales.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, overhauling the website and Google Business profile to better reach industrial buyers.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's ability to scope and price complex jobs accurately.

skills_priority: Azure, Python, SQL, Power BI, CI/CD, APIs

'Quote-to-close workflow' and 'scoping and quoting lifecycle' placed in microsoft_ft and pro_painters — directly mirrors JD's 'quote-to-close technical workflow' and 'develop quotes' language.
'Discovery' and 'requirements translation' used in microsoft_2022 bullet 2 and microsoft_2023 bullet 2 — mirrors JD's 'run discovery calls' and 'translate [specs] into standard inputs'.
'Internal tooling and processes' referenced in microsoft_ft bullet 5 — mirrors JD's 'build and refine internal software tooling and processes that make our quoting motion faster'.
